title: Split optimizer cookbooks by hypothesis lane
description: Implement lane-specific optimizer cookbooks: normal, structural, and creative. Wire hypothesis generation to inject only the relevant cookbook per slot, move creative recipes out of YAML, update tests, and verify with optimizer config and Tactus runtime suites.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented lane-specific optimizer cookbooks, slot-based cookbook injection, tests for creative isolation and structural/normal cookbook content, and verified with optimizer config tests, Tactus runtime tests, and CLI MCP harness docs smoke.
